project_type: TypeScript monorepo with pnpm workspaces and turbo build system
build_system: pnpm + turbo, per-package tsc. No published artifacts, just local dev.
test_framework: vitest (v2.x) with describe/it/expect pattern. Tests in src/__tests__/
verification_instructions: 1. Run pnpm --filter @quant/device-control typecheck (must pass with zero errors). 2. Run pnpm --filter @quant/device-control test (all tests must pass).
setup_instructions: pnpm install from workspace root. Node 22+ required.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - can install npm packages. No docker needed for tests. Twilio SDK must be mocked in tests (no real API calls).
contribution_requirements: <=500 LOC per PR. Commit message: feat(device-control): add Twilio SIP phone provider with call agent. Must typecheck and pass all tests.
key_patterns: Dual-mode provider pattern: real SDK when credentials configured, in-memory mock when absent (see packages/payments/src/services/razorpay-gateway.service.ts). CapabilityProvider<T> interface with isAvailable/initialize/dispose. PhoneCapability extends CapabilityProvider<'phone'> with placeCall/answerCall/endCall/holdCall/transferCall. All .js extensions in imports. Zod for schemas. EventEmitter-style for events.
directory_structure: packages/device-control/src/ contains: capabilities/ (interfaces), permissions/ (manager + types), audit/ (action audit logger), registry.ts (capability registry), index.ts (barrel exports), __tests__/ (vitest tests). New files go in src/providers/ for provider implementations, src/agents/ for CallAgent, src/__tests__/ for tests.
